nasb.text: Then Samuel said to Saul, “The Lord sent me to anoint you as king over His people, over Israel; now therefore, listen to the words of the Lord.

esv.text: And Samuel said to Saul, “The Lord sent me to anoint you king over his people Israel; now therefore listen to the words of the Lord.

cnv.text: 撒母耳對掃羅說：“耶和華差遣我膏立你作他子民以色列的王，所以現在你要聽耶和華的話。

ccb.text: 一天，撒母耳对扫罗说：“耶和华差遣我膏立你做祂以色列子民的王，所以你要听从祂的话。
